name: @beep/repo-checks
description: Centralized repo-wide Turbo tasks for quality and config validation

scripts.lint:effect-governance: bash -o pipefail -c 'cd ../.. && bunx biome check package.json biome.jsonc standards/effect-laws.allowlist.jsonc standards/schema-first.inventory.jsonc --files-ignore-unknown=true && bun run check:effect-imports && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- laws native-runtime --check && bun run lint:schema-first && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- laws terse-effect --check && bun run check:effect-steering && bun run check:effect-laws-allowlist'
scripts.lint:tooling-tagged-errors: bash -o pipefail -c 'cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- lint tooling-tagged-errors'
scripts.lint:circular: bash -o pipefail -c 'cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- lint circular | cat'
scripts.lint:versions: bash -o pipefail -c 'cd ../.. && bun run tooling/cli/src/bin.ts -- version-sync --skip-network'
